generated_oml:
instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor encoder measuring angular position of the motor shaft for the first axis of the MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorEncoderDataTransmitted
]

instance SecondaryEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary encoder mounted behind the gearbox measuring output angle of the gearwheel and cycloidal gearbox for the first axis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SecondaryEncoderDataTransmitted
]

instance CurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor measuring input current to the permanent magnet synchronous motor"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CurrentSensorDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorEncoderDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance SecondaryEncoderDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SecondaryEncoder
]

instance CurrentSensorDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CurrentSensor
]

instance MeasuredMotorAngle : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured angular position data from motor encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler, MQTTEnabler, DashboardEnabler
]

instance MeasuredGearboxOutputAngle : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured output angle data from secondary encoder behind the gearbox"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SecondaryEncoderDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler, MQTTEnabler, DashboardEnabler
]

instance MeasuredInputCurrent : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured input current data from current sensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentSensorDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler, MQTTEnabler, DashboardEnabler
]

instance AngularVelocity : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Calculated angular velocity derived from motor encoder data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler, MQTTEnabler, DashboardEnabler
]

instance MeasuredTorque : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Calculated torque based on input current and motor parameters"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentSensorDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler, MQTTEnabler, DashboardEnabler
]

instance SimulatedOutputs : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Outputs generated by Simulink simulation models for the motor and gearboxes"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DashboardEnabler
]

instance PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor used in the first axis of the MABI MAX 100 industrial robot for machining tasks"
]

instance Gearwheel : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Gearwheel component of the first axis of the MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
]

instance CycloidalGearbox : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gearbox component of the first axis of the MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
]

instance SysMLStructuralModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML structural model representing the first axis of the MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]

instance SimulinkMotorModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink simulation model for the permanent magnet synchronous motor"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance SimulinkGearwheelModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink simulation model for the gearwheel gearbox"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance SimulinkCycloidalGearboxModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink simulation model for the cycloidal gearbox"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance CoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "White-box Coulomb-Viscous friction model for joint friction identification"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance StribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "White-box Stribeck friction model for joint friction identification"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance DahlFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "White-box Dahl friction model for joint friction identification"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance LuGreFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "White-box LuGre friction model for joint friction identification"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance BlackBoxFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Black-box friction model for joint friction identification"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance SysMLEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML tool for structural modeling of the digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:enables StructuralModelingService
]

instance SimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink for simulation of motor and gearbox dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, MotionAccuracyImprovementService
]

instance MQTTEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for streaming sensor data from physical to virtual"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, DashboardVisualizationService
]

instance DashboardEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard tool for visualization of insights"
    DTDFVocab:enables DashboardVisualizationService
]

instance AssetAdministrationShellEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell for digital twin integration and data exchange"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, DashboardVisualizationService
]

instance StructuralModelingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for creating and maintaining SysML structural models"
    DTDFVocab:provides StructuralModelInsight
]

instance FrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous identification of joint friction using white-box and black-box models"
    DTDFVocab:provides IdentifiedFrictionParameters
]

instance MotionAccuracyImprovementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Adjusting robot control algorithms to enhance motion accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:provides AdjustControlAlgorithm
]

instance DashboardVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Integrated visualization of friction parameters and motion data in a dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualInsights
]

instance StructuralModelInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Structural model insights for system configuration and analysis"
]

instance IdentifiedFrictionParameters : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Friction parameters identified for adjusting robot control algorithms to enhance motion accuracy"
]

instance VisualInsights : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visual insights provided to human operators via dashboard"
]

instance AdjustControlAlgorithm : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic adjustment of robot control algorithms based on friction parameters"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance TwinningProcess : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Purpose-driven methodology with steps: problem identification, asset and model analysis, use/create calculations/models, data identification refined from prior work [15]."
]

instance MABIMAX100FirstAxisEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Environment for the first axis of the MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
    base:contains PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor, Gearwheel, CycloidalGearbox, MotorEncoder, SecondaryEncoder, CurrentSensor, SysMLStructuralModel, SimulinkMotorModel, SimulinkGearwheelModel, SimulinkCycloidalGearboxModel, CoulombViscousFrictionModel, StribeckFrictionModel, DahlFrictionModel, LuGreFrictionModel, BlackBoxFrictionModel, StructuralModelingService, FrictionIdentificationService, MotionAccuracyImprovementService, DashboardVisualizationService, SysMLEnabler, SimulinkEnabler, MQTTEnabler, DashboardEnabler, AssetAdministrationShellEnabler, TwinningProcess
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Digital shadow is a one-way data flow with no data pushed back to the physical system; therefore, no virtual-to-physical interaction."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time data processing and synchronization."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Digital shadow integrating the robot axis asset, structured models (SysML), data traces, processing components (simulation models), and visualization dashboard for real-time monitoring and analysis."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "As operated (using operational data during robot operation)."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for streaming sensor data from physical to virtual."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell (AAS), SysML for modeling."
]
